title: synotis guizhouensis
intro: Synotis guizhouensis is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and hepatoprotective properties. Synotis guizhouensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and is also sometimes used in combination with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
